title: Reversed Trading
description: A mod makes you can reverse villagers' trade
body:
## Reversed Trading is a mod which enables you can reverse villager's trading.

![Preview image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6e866ccc08389a18e680cde89ce66079fee8ce0.png)

## Usage
- Rename a villager "Dinnerbone" or "Grumm" to reverse tradings
- Rename other names to return to normal tradings

## Compatibility
- No known mods are incompatible with it
